parameters.formDescription: Fill in the details below to auto-generate a lifestyle photo brief and image.

values.placeholder: e.g. motorcycle couple on tropical road, EDSA commuter, beach weekend, trail hike
Specific instructions: subjects, angle, mood, color emphasis, etc.

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first();
const product = item.json['Product Model'];
const format = item.json['Content Format'];
const vibe = item.json['Scene / Vibe'];
const notes = item.json['Notes'] || 'None';

// Extract product image as base64 NOW before binary gets dropped by HTTP node
const binaryKey = Object.keys(item.binary || {})[0];
const binaryData = item.binary?.[binaryKey];
const imageBase64 = binaryData?.data || '';
const imageMime = binaryData?.mimeType || 'image/jpeg';

const systemPrompt = `You are the DuberyMNL content brief generator.

BRAND RULES (never violate):
- Product: Dubery polarized sunglasses
- Pricing: ₱699 single / ₱1,200 bundle (2 pcs) / ₱100 delivery / COD only / Metro Manila only
- Voice: Taglish (Tagalog + English mix) — confident, cool, relatable — NOT corporate, NOT pure English
- Headline: 3–7 words max, bold, ALL CAPS
- Caption: 2–4 lines, Taglish, hashtags at end
- NEVER say: free shipping, nationwide, ₱499
- ALWAYS note: price badge (₱699 LANG!) + DUBERY MNL logo in layout
- Hashtags: #DuberyMNL #PolarizedSunglasses #DuberyOptics #CODMetroManila #SameDayDelivery

PRODUCT MODEL DETAILS:
- Outback: Multiple colorways (Red/Blue/Grey/Black/Green), outdoor/trail/driving vibe
- Bandits: Tortoise or Camo frame, orange mirror lens, city/daily style
- Classic: Blue or Black, hidden camo inner arm detail, everyday versatile
- Rasta: Black frame, orange lens, Rasta stripe arm detail, lifestyle/culture
- Lycra: Sand Black, sport/active
- Drifters: XL frame, outdoor, bold look
- Evans: Mint or Black, fresh/minimalist
KEY SELLING POINT (all models): Inner arm detail — hidden design only visible up close. Always call this out.

GEMINI PROMPT RULES (critical for image quality):
1. Specify EXACT camera angle: 45-degree side/3/4 profile — NEVER frontal dead-on
2. If couple: explicitly state woman is NOT wearing sunglasses, she is looking at the man
3. Describe product with EXACT spec (frame color, lens color, arm design from model above)
4. Include this exact line: Use the provided product image as the subject. Do NOT alter the product color, frame design, or lens. Generate only the background/scene/environment around it. Keep the product 100% faithful to the original image.
5. End with: Realistic photo style, not illustrated. Portrait 4:5 composition. No watermarks, no text.

OUTPUT FORMAT — return EXACTLY these delimiters:
---GEMINI_PROMPT---
[Full Gemini prompt, 100–200 words]
---END---

---HEADLINE---
[3–7 word Taglish headline, ALL CAPS]
---END---

---SUPPORTING_LINE---
[1 line max, Taglish benefit or mood]
---END---

---CAPTION---
[2–4 lines, Taglish, end with hashtags on new line]
---END---

---CANVA_SPEC---
Canvas: 1080x1350px (portrait 4:5)
Font: Anton (condensed bold)
Headline: [placement, color, alignment]
Supporting line: [placement, color]
Logo: DUBERY MNL — [corner]
Price badge: white circle, red text, 699 LANG — [corner]
---END---`;

const userMessage = `Generate a full DuberyMNL content brief for:\n- Product: ${product}\n- Format: ${format}\n- Scene/Vibe: ${vibe}\n- Notes: ${notes}`;

return [{
  json: {
    product,
    format,
    vibe,
    notes,
    image_base64: imageBase64,
    image_mime: imageMime,
    claude_payload: {
      model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
      max_tokens: 2048,
      system: systemPrompt,
      messages: [{ role: 'user', content: userMessage }]
    }
  }
}];

nodes.name: Code: Parse Brief + Build Gemini Request

parameters.subject: ={{ '🕶️ DuberyMNL Brief — ' + $json.product + ' / ' + $json.format }}
parameters.message:
={{ `

🕶️ DuberyMNL Content Brief

Product${$json.product}
Format${$json.format}
Vibe${$json.vibe}

📸 Generated Image

${$json.has_image ? '✅ Image attached — save and bring into Canva for finishing.' : '⚠️ No image returned from Gemini — check API response or retry.'}

🖊️ Headline

${$json.headline}

Supporting Line

${$json.supporting_line}

📝 Facebook Caption

${$json.caption}

🎨 Canva Spec

${$json.canva_spec}

🤖 Gemini Prompt Used

${$json.gemini_prompt}

Generated by FIGGY • DuberyMNL Content Pipeline

` }}

main.node: Code: Parse Brief + Build Gemini Request
